input.user_input: The section numbering in the employment agreement is off — Section 7 is duplicated. Renumber everything from Section 7 onward.

actual:
I don't see an employment agreement uploaded in our current session. 

Could you please upload or share the document? Once you do, I can review the current numbering, fix the duplicated Section 7, renumber the subsequent sections, and ensure any cross-references to those sections are updated accordingly.
